prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-FROZEN2BRUSH-LEAVES Product Type: HAIR_BRUSH Brand (from catalog): Disney Frozen Existing Title: Frozen 2 Girls Hair Brush Confetti Leaves 8 Inch Description: Perfect for any little princess in training, Frozen 2 Anna and Elsa movie fans will learn to love brushing their hair with this printed, round paddle hair brush. With soft and flexible nylon bristles, an ergonomic and easy to grip handle and fun Frozen 2 princess design, Frozen 2 fans will soon have perfect princess hair just like Elsa and her sister Anna.

Gifting your Frozen 2 princess fan their very own hair brush will teach them personal grooming skills and help them develop their fine motor skills too, as they learn to brush and de-tangle their own hair after a shower or bath. The flexible, soft, nylon bristles work through tangles without pulling or tugging; a wide, flat base covers a broad surface area of hair and the cushioned bristle body allows for gentle brushing and styling. The hair brush is great for all hair types and lengths and will work when brushing hair extensions or ponytail extensions.

HOW TO USE SOFT BRISTLE BRUSH: To de-tangle on wet or dry hair, start by brushing out the ends and work your way up to the crown; if your little one has fun colored hair extensions, hold the hair below the top of the extension and brush away tangles; all of the above will help to avoid unnecessary tugging and pulling that breaks the hair

Officially licensed Disney Frozen 2 merchandise.

This is great party favor, stocking stuffer or gift for young kids and Frozen 2 fans. Search Terms: elsa anna 2 2 hair brush girls hair accessories girls hair brush kids hair brush girls hair brush kids paddle brushes girls detangling brushes soft bristle brushes gifts for girls beauty gifts for girls teach kids hygiene any hair type brush Features: - FROZEN 2 CONFETTI HAIR BRUSH: Perfect for any little princess in training, Frozen 2 Anna and Elsa movie fans will learn to love brushing their hair with this printed, square paddle hair brush; With soft and flexible nylon bristles, an ergonomic and easy to grip handle and fun Frozen 2 princess design, Frozen 2 fans will soon have perfect princess hair just like Elsa and her sister Anna - FLEXIBLE NYLON BRISTLES: Flexible, soft, nylon bristles work through tangles without pulling or tugging; a wide, flat base covers a broad surface area of hair and the cushioned bristle body allows for gentle brushing and styling; Great for all hair types and lengths and will work when brushing hair extensions or ponytail extensions - TEACHES PERSONAL GROOMING: Gifting your Frozen 2 princess fan their very own hair brush will teach them personal grooming skills and help them develop their fine motor skills too, as they learn to brush and de-tangle their own hair after a shower or bath; plus, kids will love seeing the gold leaf confetti float around the top of the hair brush as they brush their hair! - HOW TO USE SOFT BRISTLE BRUSH: To de-tangle on wet or dry hair, start by brushing out the ends and work your way up to the crown; if your little one has fun colored hair extensions, hold the hair below the top of the extension and brush away tangles; all of the above will help to avoid unnecessary tugging and pulling that breaks the hair - SPECIFICATIONS: Brush Dimensions: 3.5 x 2 x 8 inches; Color: Multi; Brush Material: Plastic; Bristle Material: Nylon === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
